final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" (the goddess sister).

Style/medium: needs a livestream UI aesthetic — exact platform styling and overlay design are yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format, typical mobile livestream framing with streamer centered
Subject: must include a female streamer (the "神仙姐姐" character) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: needs a livestream room setting — exact background decor is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio, must look like an authentic Douyin livestream screenshot
Avoid:
